migration_policy: additive until 1.x; breaking changes require migration note, fixture update, backwards-compatibility decision, explicit reviewer approval
title: CC learner attempt event
description: One quiz submission. The engine re-grades selected_index against the committed practice keys, so the event never carries the correct answer, any stem, or any choice text. submitted_at is an injected integer time unit (the engine never reads the wall clock). Anonymous by construction — no PII fields are permitted.

item_id.description: Must resolve in the practice lane; holdout/unknown ids are rejected by the engine.

submitted_at.description: Injected monotonic time unit (e.g. day index). Interval math uses these units.
